Kleinschmidt, Arthur - --2025 DHHS POLITICAL APPOINTEES (NON PAS)  - New Entrant - 278 - 2025 - 2025-03-15
New Entrant Report
Department of Health & Human Services
Recovery for America Now Foundation
Filer is president and founder of Recovery for America Now, a 501c3.  It will be dormant through filer's HHS service.
President and Founder, 11/2022 - 4/2025
Dr. Goldberg & Associates, PLLC
Filer is a 1099 contractor with Dr. Goldberg & Associates, PLLC.  He is paid through filer's LLC, Kleinschmidt Consulting and Counseling, LLC.
Psychotherapist, 9/2023 - 4/2025
Sondermind Provider Network
Filer was a 1099 contractor for this mental health telehealth company.
Psychotherapist, 6/2023 - 3/2024
Kleinschmidt Consulting & Counseling, LLC

Filer is the sole member of this LLC.  The LLC was set up to receive payments from Dr. Goldberg & Associates, PLLC for filer's work as a psychotherapist.  This LLC will be left dormant during filer's tenure at HHS.
Sole member, 1/2024 - 4/2025

Recovery for America Now (value not ascertainable)

Filer operates 501c3.  He does not draw a salary or other benefits.  The non-profit has a checking account that will be liquidated and awarded to another non-profit of similar mission prior to filer onboarding.

"Planting Seeds, A Client Centered Approach to Addiction Treatment," CreateSpace Independent Publishing Platform (value not readily ascertainable)
This is a published manual held by Kleinschmidt Counseling and Consulting, LLC. The manual has not earned reportable income.

I continue to participate in this defined contribution plan. The plan sponsor ceased making contributions at my separation. (2009-11-01)
